projects.title: Kite AI Governance
projects.description: Agent economy lifecycle landing on Kite AI settlement layer. AAE integration for decentralized agent marketplace governance.

projects.title: Swarms ACM LP Monitor
projects.description: Marketplace agent for DeFi LP monitoring and analysis. Built on Swarms framework for autonomous finance and market analysis.

projects.title: Bags FM Agent Trading Desk
projects.description: AI agent trading desk on Bags FM memecoin launchpad. Autonomous token analysis, portfolio management, and trade execution.

projects.title: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Cross-chain payment infrastructure with AI agent integration. Anchor programs built (AgentRegistry, JobEscrow, Reputation, DisputeResolver) — preserved for cross-chain reuse after Solana Frontier withdrawal.

projects.title: Let's FG Travel Agent
projects.description: Voice-first travel planning agent. Natural language flight/hotel search, price tracking, and booking automation via Pipecat and Maps APIs.

projects.title: AAE Defi Milestones
projects.description: Automated DeFi portfolio management system with cross-chain rebalancing and gas optimization. Monitors pool ranges and rebalances positions to optimize fee capture and minimize IL.

projects.title: Hermes Kanban
projects.description: TUI-based kanban board for autonomous agent task management. Integrated with Hermes agent orchestration for real-time task tracking and handoffs.
